articles.headline: Codex App Updated
articles.summary: OpenAI has updated its Codex app for macOS and Windows, adding several new features to accelerate developer workflows. The updated app now includes computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins. These additions aim to make the app more versatile and user-friendly. The update reflects OpenAI's ongoing efforts to improve its tools for developers.
articles.impact: This update is significant for AI agent builders as it provides them with a more comprehensive and efficient toolset for their workflows, potentially streamlining their development processes and improving productivity.
